error but didn't: %s\", tt.name, tt.description)\n757\t\t\t\t\t} else {\n758\t\t\t\t\t\tt.Logf(\"✓ Test '%s' correctly produced error: %v\", tt.name, err)\n759\t\t\t\t\t}\n760\t\t\t\t} else errors produce appropriate error messages\n773\tfunc TestBasicPrimitiveErrorMessageQuality(t *testing.T) {\n774\t\ttests := []struct {\n775\t\t\tname         string\n776\t\t\tyamlContent  string\n777\t\t\ttarget       interface{}\n778\t\t\terrorPattern string\n779\t\t\tdescription  string\n780\t\t}{\n781\t\t\t{\n782\t\t\t\tname: \"string to int error message\",\n783\t\t\t\tyamlContent: `\n784\tvalue: \"abc\"\n785\t`,\n786\t\t\t\ttarget:       &struct{ Value int }{},\n787\t\t\t\terrorPattern: \"cannot unmarshal\",\n788\t\t\t\tdescription:  \"String to int error should mention unmarshal failure\",\n789\t\t\t},\n790\t\t\t{\n791\t\t\t\tname: \"bool to int error message\",\n792\t\t\t\tyamlContent: `\n793\tvalue: true\n794\t`,\n795\t\t\t\ttarget:       &struct{ Value int }{},\n796\t\t\t\terrorPattern: \"cannot unmarshal\",\n797\t\t\t\tdescription:  \"Bool to int error should mention unmarshal failure\",\n798\t\t\t},\n799\t\t\t{\n800\t\t\t\tname: \"float to bool error message\",\n801\t\t\t\tyamlContent: `\n802\tvalue: 3.14\n803\t`,\n804\t\t\t\ttarget:       &struct{ Value bool }{},\n805\t\t\t\terrorPattern: \"cannot unmarshal\",\n806\t\t\t\tdescription:  \"Float to bool error should mention unmarshal failure\",\n807\t\t\t},\n808\t\t\t{\n809\t\t\t\tname: \"negative to uint error message\",\n810\t\t\t\tyamlContent: `\n811\tvalue: -5\n812\t`,\n813\t\t\t\ttarget:       &struct{ Value uint }{},\n814\t\t\t\terrorPattern: \"cannot unmarshal\",\n815\t\t\t\tdescription:  \"Negative to uint error should mention unmarshal failure\",\n816\t\t\t},\n817\t\t\t{\n818\t\t\t\tname: \"array to string error message\",\n819\t\t\t\tyamlContent: `\n820\tvalue:\n821\t  - item1\n822\t  - item2\n823\t`,\n824\t\t\t\ttarget:       &struct{ Value string }{},\n825\t\t\t\terrorPattern: \"cannot unmarshal\",\n826\t\t\t\tdescription:  \"Array to string error should mention unmarshal failure\",\n827\t\t\t},\n828\t\t\t{\n829\t\t\t\tname: \"object to int error message\",\n830\t\t\t\tyamlContent: `\n831\tvalue:\n832\t  key: val\n833\t`,\n834\t\t\t\ttarget:       &struct{ Value int }{},\n835\t\t\t\terrorPattern: \"cannot unmarshal\",\n836\t\t\t\tdescription:  \"Object to int error should mention unmarshal failure\",\n837\t\t\t},\n838\t\t}\n839\t\n840\t\tfor _, tt := range tests {\n841\t\t\tt.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n842\t\t\t\tparser := NewParser()\n843\t\n844\t\t\t\terr := parser.ParseString(tt.yamlContent, tt.target)\n845\t\n846\t\t\t\tif err == nil {\n847\t\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Test '%s' should error but didn't\", tt.name)\n848\t\t\t\t} else {\n849\t\t\t\t\terrMsg := err.Error()\n850\t\t\t\t\tt.Logf(\"✓ Error message: %s\", errMsg)\n851\t\n852\t\t\t\t\t// Verify error message contains expected pattern\n853\t\t\t\t\tif !contains(errMsg, tt.errorPattern) {\n854\t\t\t\t\t\tt.Logf(\"Note: Error message doesn't contain pattern %q: %s\", tt.errorPattern, errMsg)\n855\t\t\t\t\t}\n856\t\t\t\t}\n857\t\t\t})\n858\t\t}\n859\t}\n860\t\n861\t// TestScalarToScalarConversionMatrix tests all scalar-to-scalar type conversion combinations\n862\t// to ensure comprehensive coverage of primitive type conversions\n863\tfunc TestScalarToScalarConversionMatrix(t *testing.T) {\n864\t\ttests := []struct {\n865\t\t\tname        string\n866\t\t\tyamlContent string\n867\t\t\ttarget      interface{}\n868\t\t\tshouldError bool\n869\t\t\tdescription string\n870\t\t}{\n871\t\t\t// String → Scalar\n872\t\t\t{\"string→string\", `value: \"text\"`, &struct{ Value string }{}, false, \"String to string succeeds\"},\n873\t\t\t{\"string→int\", `value: \"123\"`, &struct{ Value int }{}, true, \"String to int errors\"},\n874\t\t\t{\"string→float\", `value: \"3.14\"`, &struct{ Value float64 }{}, true, \"String to float errors\"},\n875\t\t\t{\"string→bool\", `value: \"true\"`, &struct{ Value bool }{}, true, \"String to bool errors\"},\n876\t\n877\t\t\t// Int → Scalar\n878\t\t\t{\"int→string\", `value: 123`, &struct{ Value string }{}, false, \"Int to string succeeds\"},\n879\t\t\t{\"int→int\", `value: 1`, &struct{ Value bool }{}, true, \"Int to bool errors\"},\n882\t\n883\t\t\t// Float → Scalar\n884\t\t\t{\"float→string\", `value: 3.14`, &struct{ Value string }{}, false, \"Float to string succeeds\"},\n885\t\t\t{\"float→int\", `value: 3.14`, &struct{ Value int }{}, false, \"Float to int succeeds (truncates)\"},\n886\t\t\t{\"float→float\", `value: 3.14`, &struct{ Value float64 }{}, false, \"Float to float succeeds\"},\n887\t\t\t{\"float→bool\", `value: 1.5`, &struct{ Value bool }{}, true, \"Float to bool errors\"},\n888\t\n889\t\t\t// Bool → Scalar\n890\t\t\t{\"bool→string\", `value: false`, &struct{ Value float64 }{}, true, \"Bool to float errors\"},\n893\t\t\t{\"bool→bool\", `value: true`, &struct{ Value bool }{}, false, \"Bool to bool succeeds\"},\n894\t\n895\t\t\t// Uint → Scalar\n896\t\t\t{\"uint→string\", `value: 42`, &struct{ Value string }{}, false, \"Uint to string succeeds\"},\n897\t\t\t{\"uint→int\", `value: 42`, &struct{ Value int }{}, false, \"Uint to int succeeds\"},\n898\t\t\t{\"uint→float\", `value: 42`, &struct{ Value float64 }{}, false, \"Uint to float succeeds\"},\n899\t\t\t{\"uint→bool\", `value: 1`, &struct{ Value bool }{}, true, \"Uint to bool errors\"},\n900\t\t}\n901\t\n902\t\tfor _, tt := range tests {\n903\t\t\tt.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n904\t\t\t\tparser := NewParser()\n905\t\n906\t\t\t\terr := parser.ParseString(tt.yamlContent, tt.target)\n907\t\n908\t\t\t\tif tt.shouldError {\n909\t\t\t\t\tif err == nil {\n910\t\t\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Test '%s' should error but didn't: %s\", tt.name, tt.description)\n911\t\t\t\t\t} else {\n912\t\t\t\t\t\tt.Logf(\"✓ %s: error correctly produced\", tt.name)\n913\t\t\t\t\t}\n914\t\t\t\t} else {\n915\t\t\t\t\tif err != nil {\n916\t\t\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Test '%s' should succeed but errored: %v - %s\", tt.name, err, tt.description)\n917\t\t\t\t\t} else {\n918\t\t\t\t\t\tt.Logf(\"✓ %s: success correctly produced\", tt.name)\n919\t\t\t\t\t}\n920\t\t\t\t}\n921\t\t\t})\n922\t\t}\n923\t}\n924\t\n925\t// Helper functions are already defined in
